[Small Outdoor Banner Frame](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/outdoor-banner-frame-small) 5. Small Outdoor Banner Frame Kit # Outdoor Banner Frame Small Combo with 33" x 46" Banners The Outdoor Banner Frame - Small is designed to hold one or two banners. The aluminum frame is quick and easy to assemble. The display includes bungee cords for attaching the banner and ground stakes. All packaged in a convenient nylon carrying case. Prices include Outdoor Banner Frame and (1) or (2) Full Color 33" x 46" Vinyl Banners ![Outdoor Banner Frame Small 33x46](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/9d224f71-e536-4402-b921-d9fcb77458bb.jpg) Material Choice: 13 oz Vinyl for Outdoor Frames (2) 13 oz Vinyl Banners for Outdoor Frames Product: with Outdoor Banner Frame Small Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 33" x 46" 33" x 46" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options...
